ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., XS, S, M, L) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region for which the size chart is applicable (foreign key to regions) */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Gender for which the size chart is applicable (foreign key to genders) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the size chart is applicable for (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "customizable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the size chart can be customized */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the measurement belongs to (foreign key to size_charts) */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., Neck, Chest, Waist) */,
  "measurement_value" TEXT /* Value of the measurement with corresponding size label */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the measurement range */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the measurement range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, EU, Asia) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language used in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gender was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garments" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment */,
  "garment_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment (e.g., T-shirt, Jeans) */,
  "garment_type" TEXT /* Type of garment (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the garment */,
  "collection" TEXT /* Collection the garment belongs to */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the garment */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the garment */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart used for the garment (foreign key to size_charts) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the garment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the garment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment (foreign key to garments) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size (foreign key to size_charts) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the inventory is stored (foreign key to locations) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment in inventory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the inventory entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production process */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment being produced (foreign key to garments) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the production is taking place (foreign key to locations) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production process */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production process */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Cost of production */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the production process (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the production entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the production entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment sold (foreign key to garments) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size sold (foreign key to size_charts) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the sale occurred (foreign key to locations) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the garment was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sale entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the sale entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, production team, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
